speaker: seller

args.message: Hey there! You've got a great eye for a deal. This 2018 Toyota Prius Two is a fantastic choice for anyone looking to save big on gas without sacrificing reliability. It's got that legendary Toyota hybrid system, and with over 50 MPG, your wallet will thank you. This one's been well-maintained and has a clean history, so it's ready to go for miles and miles of worry-free driving.
